message:
Add comprehensive FrankenTUI beads with dependency graph

Creates 61 self-documenting beads covering the complete FrankenTUI
implementation plan with full dependency structure:

STRUCTURE:
- 1 master epic (bd-10i)
- 11 phase/area epics (Phase -1 through 7, ADRs, Testing)
- 49 detailed tasks with technical specs and acceptance criteria

DEPENDENCY GRAPH:
- Phase -1 Spikes → ADRs → Phase 0 Contracts
- Phase 0 → Phase 1 (Core Render) → Phase 2 (Diff/Presenter)
- Phase 2 → Phase 3 (Input) → Phase 4 (Styling) → Phase 5 (Widgets)
- Phase 5 → Phase 6 (Runtime) → Phase 7 (Extras/Polish)
- Testing epic runs parallel to implementation phases

READY TASKS (entry points with no blockers):
- 3 Decision Spikes (Inline Mode, Presenter, Terminal Backend)
- 3 Independent ADRs (Windows Scope, One-Writer, Sanitize-by-Default)

Each bead contains:
- Complete technical requirements
- Design rationale and background
- Acceptance criteria with checkboxes
- Performance budgets where applicable
- Location in workspace (crate mapping)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Beads Project Configuration
+# issue_prefix: bd
+# default_priority: 2
+# default_type: task
